case_title: THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. VS. HAROLD DEWITT et al

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 124 TURK STREET, #107, SAN FRANCISCO, CALIFORNIA, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. ON DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $255.30 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD
DECLARATION OF PAUL ARSHAWSKY RE: LOST RENTAL AGREEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO PLTF'S POSSESSION ONLY; AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC. SERVED DEC-31-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DEWITT, HAROLD
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $13.83 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE JOHN STEWART COMPANY, INC.
